validation_issues.issue: Shot 3 specifies 'Deep' depth of field for a 35mm lens at f/2.8, which is optically inconsistent with the wide aperture.
validation_issues.correction: Adjusted depth of field to 'Medium' to maintain optical plausibility.

cuts.reference: [인서트] 화려한 파티장. 드레스를 입은 루다가 강태주의 팔짱을 끼고 우아하게 건배한다.
cuts.description: Medium shot of Luda in an elegant dress clinking glasses with Tae-joo in a luxurious ballroom.

composition.movement_motivation: To follow the movement of the toast across the frame

cuts.pacing_note: Rapid, rhythmic cut to initiate the montage.

cuts.reference: [인서트] 법원 앞. 정장을 입은 루다가 서지한의 넥타이를 세심하게 매준다.
cuts.description: Close up of Luda's hands precisely adjusting Ji-han's necktie.

composition.movement_motivation: To emphasize the precision and care of the movement

cuts.pacing_note: Short, sharp cut to maintain montage momentum.

cuts.reference: [인서트] 방송국 대기실. 마스크를 쓴 루다가 강은우의 이마에 맺힌 땀을 닦아준다.
cuts.description: Medium close up of Luda, wearing a mask, wiping sweat from Eun-woo's forehead.

composition.movement_motivation: To increase the sense of intimacy and closeness

cuts.pacing_note: Slightly longer duration to allow for the emotional shift.

cuts.reference: [인서트] 어두운 골목. 가죽 재킷을 입은 루다가 블랙의 등 뒤에서 차갑게 총을 장전한다.
cuts.description: Extreme close up of a handgun being loaded in a dark alley.
cuts.emotional_intent: Reveal the lethal, predatory reality of the character.
cuts.pacing_note: High-intensity, jarring cut to peak the tension.

cuts.reference: 루다 (NA) 국가를 위해 나는 4번 결혼했고, 4번 이혼했다. 임무는 완벽했고, 위장은 철저했다. 그리고 오늘.
cuts.description: Close up of Luda's face looking directly into the camera, breaking the montage.

composition.movement_motivation: To force the viewer into a confrontation with her truth

cuts.pacing_note: The 'Out' beat; a sustained, heavy shot that breaks the montage rhythm.

production_notes.pacing_assessment: The montage follows a classic 'acceleration-to-impact' structure, moving from social warmth to lethal coldness, concluding with a dramatic temporal pause.
risk_areas: Shot 4 (ECU) requires extremely precise lighting and focus in a low-light environment to ensure the bullet/chamber is visible.
The transition from the fast-paced montage (Cuts 1-4) to the slow-moving final reveal (Cut 5) must be synchronized with a musical shift to avoid feeling disjointed.
recommendations: Use a heavy, rhythmic orchestral score that builds in percussion during the montage and abruptly drops to a single, haunting note or silence for the final VO.
Ensure the 'sweat' on Eun-woo (Cut 3) is highly visible to maintain the 'physical exertion' requirement from the script analysis.
